items.reviewerNotes: Road marking is horizontal deceleration marking; local option A carries that meaning despite master option B.
100 road marking is maximum speed limit 100 km/h, matching q0862.
Rejected top q0848: source arrow is straight plus left turn, not U-turn. q0860 matches and local option C says straight/left.
ABS emergency braking function is preventing wheel lock; local D matches q0589.
Night road with good lighting uses low beam; local B matches q0134.
Rejected top q0598 dashboard symbol. Image shows obstacle with oncoming car; q0456 stop/yield is exact.
Dashboard switch icon controls child safety lock, matching q0614 local A.
Low tire pressure wave deformation causing tire blowout matches q0179; local D is tire blowout.
Sign is embankment/dike road; local A matches q0836.
G105 shield is national road; local A carries q0738 national-road meaning.
Decision memory confirms this yellow dashed curb false-positive pattern: q0831 is correct and local option C means no long stopping, rejecting top q0709 solid curb.
Decision memory flags extracted C as a known conflict for this road-exit image; q0802 with local D road-exit marking is the safer reviewed mapping.
Pedestrian crossing sign matches q0658; local A is crosswalk.
Danger-avoiding/emergency escape lane sign matches q0815; local A carries the correct meaning.
Same q0802 road-exit marking case as the earlier duplicate; decision memory says extracted C conflicts and local D is the road-exit marking answer.
Rejected dashboard-symbol candidates. Image is broken-down vehicle with hazards but no warning sign; q0428 exact, local A.
Instrument is tachometer/engine speed gauge, matching q0609 local A.
High engine coolant temperature indicator matches q0627; French local B carries that meaning.
Rejected top q0685 turn-left: image is blue mandatory pass/keep-left sign. Source extracted B is misleading; local A best matches q0665 passing by left side.
Image asset matches q0410 (120 sign from driver view) rather than q0505/q0367. Local B is 90 km/h, matching q0410.
Rejected ABS candidate. Dashboard icon is hazard lights; q0616 matches and local B says hazard lights.
Rejected dashboard candidates. Image/text asks white dashed lines in circles at intersection; q0704 intersection guide line, local D.
Blue mandatory left-turn sign matches q0685; local C means turn left.
